Package com.sait.workshop05.api

package com.sait.workshop05.api
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.sait.workshop05
     
    com.sait.workshop05.api.dto
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ApiClient
    Singleton HTTP client for the Workshop 7 Spring Boot API (springdoc OpenAPI on the server).
    BakeryApi
    Admin bakery create update and delete.
    CatalogApi
    Wrappers for catalog and specials endpoints.
    CatalogApi.AddressResponse
     
    CatalogApi.BakeryHourJson
    JSON for bakery hours rows.
    CatalogApi.BakeryResponse
     
    CatalogApi.ProductResponse
    JSON for GET /api/v1/products.
    CatalogApi.ProductSpecialResponse
    JSON for GET /api/v1/product-specials/all.
    CatalogApi.TagResponse
     
    ChatApi
    Static helpers for chat threads and messages.
    ChatApi.MessageJson
     
    ChatApi.StaffJson
     
    ChatApi.ThreadJson
     
    CustomerApi
    Admin customer operations under /api/v1/admin/customers.
    CustomerApi.CustomerRow
     
    DashboardApi
    Dashboard summary from GET /api/v1/admin/dashboard/summary.
    DashboardApi.SummaryResponse
     
    EmployeeApi
    Staff list from /api/v1/employee/staff and admin writes under /api/v1/admin/employees.
    EmployeeApi.EmployeeRow
     
    ImageUploadApi
    Uploads images through admin routes.
    MessageApi
    Staff messaging via /api/v1/messages.
    MessageApi.LegacyMessageJson
     
    OrderApi
    Orders list detail items status updates and staff checkout.
    OrderApi.ItemJson
     
    OrderApi.OrderJson
     
    ReferenceApi
    Loads reference data for admin screens (customers, bakeries, addresses, catalog).
    ReferenceApi.AddressJson
     
    ReferenceApi.CustomerJson
     
    ReferenceApi.UserSummaryJson
     
    RewardApi
    Reads /api/v1/rewards and joins optional order rows for readable columns in the UI.
    RewardApi.RewardJson
     
    RewardTierApi
    Admin CRUD for reward tier rows at /api/v1/reward-tiers.
    RewardTierApi.RewardTierJson
     
    UserManagementApi
    Desktop client for /api/v1/admin/users list create and PATCH active flag.
    UserManagementApi.UserRow
